boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: The execution release (REL-AST-081) does not contain the exact hazard-control status required by the policy (STD-AST-081-P) and warning (WARN-AST-081) for controlled solvents.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The action boundary requires exact hazard-control evidence for controlled solvents. REL-AST-081 mentions 'active cabinet/handler controls' but does not provide the exact hazard-control status required by STD-AST-081-P and WARN-AST-081.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The execution release (REL-AST-081) must confirm exact hazard-control status before PO execution, as per STD-AST-081-P. This confirmation is missing.

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed because the execution release (REL-AST-081) fails to provide the exact hazard-control status required by policy (STD-AST-081-P) and the safety warning (WARN-AST-081). While the release mentions active controls, it does not explicitly confirm the specific hazard-control status needed for this regulated solvent. Therefore, the source boundary remains open, necessitating escalation.
open_blockers: Exact hazard-control status is not confirmed in the execution release.
